description: High-risk ASMR subtitle scan patterns. Matches are candidates for human/agent review, not automatic errors.

patterns.name: asr_thanks
patterns.pattern: 感谢(?:您的)?观看|谢谢观看
patterns.problem: May be ASR hallucination over long sounds or ending noise.
patterns.suggestion: Check audio/source; if it is only sound, replace with a short sound cue.

patterns.name: asr_subscribe
patterns.problem: Often ASR/video-platform hallucination in ASMR audio.
patterns.suggestion: Check source context before keeping as dialogue.

patterns.name: model_artifact
patterns.problem: Likely model or formatting artifact.
patterns.suggestion: Remove or retranslate from the original subtitle.

patterns.name: vagus
patterns.problem: Likely mistranslation of 迷走神経.
patterns.suggestion: Check whether it should be 迷走神经.

patterns.name: seieki_justice
patterns.problem: Adult ASMR context may have confused 精液 with 正義.
patterns.suggestion: Check source; often should be 精液.

patterns.name: shasei_writing
patterns.pattern: 写生|写真|书生|照片|姿势
patterns.problem: May be ASR/translation drift from 射精 in adult ASMR.
patterns.suggestion: Check neighboring subtitles and climax/countdown context.

patterns.name: m_otoko
patterns.problem: May be misread from M男 depending on context.
patterns.suggestion: Check character/roleplay context.

patterns.name: tekoki
patterns.problem: Likely mistranslation of 手コキ or hand stimulation.
patterns.suggestion: Check source; often should be 手冲 or 用手帮你弄.

patterns.name: shiko_urine
patterns.problem: May be mistaken from シコ/しっこ in adult ASMR.
patterns.suggestion: Check source; often should be 撸/撸撸 in hand-stimulation context.

patterns.name: sourou
patterns.pattern: 僧侣|僧侶|骚动|騒動|Souro|灵魂|步态|神父
patterns.problem: May be 早漏（そうろう） in early-ejaculation themed works.
patterns.suggestion: Check title and recurring theme; normalize if the work is about 早漏.

patterns.name: onanie_owner
patterns.pattern: 主人|服侍主人|オーナー
patterns.problem: May be オナニー misrecognized as owner/master wording.
patterns.suggestion: Check whether the source is 自慰/手淫 rather than master-servant dialogue.

patterns.name: fellatio_overuse
patterns.problem: Can be wrong when source is オナニー/ホナニー/オナサポ rather than フェラ.
patterns.suggestion: Confirm sex act from source before keeping 口交.

patterns.name: onasuport
patterns.problem: Term is acceptable but can sound stiff in dialogue.
patterns.suggestion: Check whether 陪你自慰 or 帮你弄 is more natural in context.

patterns.name: doutei
patterns.problem: May be corrupted from 童貞喪失.
patterns.suggestion: Check source; often should be 童贞丧失 or 破处.

patterns.name: police
patterns.problem: May be unrelated near-sound ASR error.
patterns.suggestion: Check source before keeping.

patterns.name: shi_houdai
patterns.problem: May be mistranslation of し放題.
patterns.suggestion: Check whether 想怎么做都可以 is intended.

patterns.name: nama_ecchi
patterns.problem: May be 生エッチ in adult ASMR.
patterns.suggestion: Check whether 无套做爱 is intended.

patterns.name: miminame_raw
patterns.problem: Japanese term left in Chinese output.
patterns.suggestion: Use 舔耳, 舔耳朵, or [舔耳声].

patterns.name: love_hotel
patterns.problem: Less natural localization for ラブホテル.
patterns.suggestion: Use 情人旅馆 if context fits.

patterns.name: cos_layer
patterns.problem: Likely mistranslation of レイヤー.
patterns.suggestion: Use coser/官方 coser as appropriate.

patterns.name: asmr_script_artifact
patterns.problem: May be model literalization or odd phrasing.
patterns.suggestion: Check source and make the cosplay reference natural.
